message:
e2e tests+benches: type safety, clippy compliance, and idiomatic fixes

bd_1lsfu_1_generate_baseline.rs:
- Replace bare `rows.len() as i64` cast with `i64::try_from().expect()`
  to catch impossible-in-practice but theoretically truncating casts.
- Add `#[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)]` to `capture_baseline` since
  the function is inherently long (measures all 9 operations).
- Improve `#[ignore]` attribute with reason string for documentation.

bd_1lsfu_1_operation_baselines.rs:
- Replace closure `|o| o.display_name()` with method reference
  `Operation::display_name`.
- Add `#[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)]` to the full 9-op baseline
  capture test.

bd_3plop_5_ssi_serialization_correctness.rs:
- Change `run_worker` parameter from `&PathBuf` to `&Path` per
  clippy::ptr_arg -- `&Path` is strictly more general and avoids
  requiring callers to have an owned PathBuf.
- Remove unused `PathBuf` import.

bd_3plop_6_raptorq_self_healing.rs:
- Extract `RepairGroup` type alias for the verbose
  `(DbFecGroupMeta, Vec<(u32, Vec<u8>)>)` tuple used in group building.
- Replace `for b in data[..header_len].iter_mut()` with idiomatic
  `for b in &mut data[..header_len]`.
- Replace `g as u32` cast with `u32::try_from(g).expect()`.
- Add `#[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)]` to the main showcase test.

bd_n0g4q_6_repair_matrix.rs:
- Consolidate nested `RecoveryClassification::Lost` match arms: merge
  two separate `Lost { reason: A } | Lost { reason: B }` arms into
  `Lost { reason: A | B }` using or-patterns within the struct pattern.

extension_json_fts_parity.rs:
- Replace `r#"..."#` raw string literals with `r"..."` where the string
  contains no double quotes (json_array, json_object queries).

seed_reproducibility.rs:
- Extract inline scenario hash array into module-level constant
  `SCENARIO_HASHES` to eliminate duplication across two test functions.
- Update `FRANKEN_SEED` assertion to match new `0x0046_5241_4E4B_454E`
  formatting.

ssi_write_skew.rs:
- Replace `.expect(&format!("..."))` with `.unwrap_or_else(|_| panic!())`
  across 4 call sites in `ssi_sequential_concurrent_transactions` to
  avoid allocating a format string on every successful call (clippy
  expect_fun_call lint).

operation_baseline_bench.rs:
- Replace `rows.len() as i64` with `i64::try_from().expect()` in two
  sequential scan benchmark assertions.
- Replace `|conn| { ... }` closure wrapping `setup_csqlite_seeded()` with
  direct function reference `setup_csqlite_seeded` in `iter_batched`.
- Replace `|| setup_fsqlite_seeded()` with `setup_fsqlite_seeded`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
